_meta.stability: Frozen for the loom-generation lifetime per ADR-002.
_meta.relation_to_classic: No classic dashboard counterpart — issue events are exposed via MCP (get_issue_events) in the classic generation. Loom is the first HTTP surface. event_id replaces id at the entity primary-key level.

shape_decl.request_type: GET; query params limit (default 50), offset (ignored — listing is per-issue and bounded by limit)
shape_decl.rationale: IssueEventLoom = EventRecord with id renamed to event_id. issue_id is a cross-entity ref and kept. Overfetches by 1 to detect has_more.

examples.name: issue_not_found
examples.note: Missing issue id → 404 (db.get_issue_events validates via self.get_issue).
